summary: Initial coordinator scaffold only; no implementation slice has run.
observations: The repo is currently a Phaser MVP.
Future work should start with a bounded mobile FPS vertical-slice plan.
decisions: Use docs/sub-agents as the sub-agent source of truth.
Require per-agent observations and handoff JSON.
Close spawned agents after final output is captured.
risks: A rewrite can sprawl unless each slice has an owner, gate, and stop condition.
